lineup_source: Predicted Haiti starting XI (4-4-2) vs Morocco, World Cup Group C, June 2026 (Sports Mole)

players.name: Johny Placide
players.note: Born in Montfermeil, France, to Haitian parents; captain of Haiti.

players.name: Carlens Arcus
players.note: Born in Port-au-Prince, Haiti; parents' origins undocumented, assumed Haitian.

players.name: Hannes Delcroix
players.note: Born Piterson Désir in Petite-Rivière-de-l'Artibonite, Haiti, to Haitian biological parents; adopted at age 2 by a Belgian couple and raised in Belgium.

players.name: Ricardo Adé
players.note: Born in Saint-Marc, Haiti, to parents Karl Henry Adé and Mona Chéry.

players.name: Martin Expérience
players.note: Born in France of Haitian descent; parents' specific origins undocumented.

players.name: Louicius Deedson
players.note: Born in Tabarre, Haiti; parents' origins undocumented, assumed Haitian.

players.name: Jean-Ricner Bellegarde
players.note: Born in Colombes, France, of Haitian descent; parents' specific origins undocumented.

players.name: Danley Jean Jacques
players.note: Born in Petit-Goâve, Haiti; parents' origins undocumented, assumed Haitian.

players.name: Ruben Providence
players.note: Born in Lagny-sur-Marne, France, to Haitian parents; exhausted French youth eligibility before choosing Haiti.

players.name: Wilson Isidor
players.note: Born in Rennes, France, to Haitian father Jean Isidor and Malagasy mother Marie-Louise Rakotomalala; switched to Haiti in March 2026.

players.name: Frantzdy Pierrot
players.note: Born in Cap-Haïtien, Haiti; emigrated to Massachusetts, USA, as a child where his father had moved earlier for work.
